title: REAL LIVE ARMISAEL
wikitext:
[]: REAL LIVE ARMISAEL!             Quote Post by Fendifendi » Tue Oct 13, 2009 9:32 pm Just recently spotted in Moscow Russia! http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sHOPxVM6oIw

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Oct 13, 2009 9:34 pm WE GONNA DIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIIEEEEEEEEEE!!!!!!!!!!!!!! In all seriousness, that's pretty cool I guess. I never seen/heard anything like it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:04 pm Hopefully it doesn't go on a mind-raping spree.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:16 pm This makes me wonder how you came across that video. :) In all seriousness, it would be interesting to find out what caused that. Is it...real?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:18 pm Yes but it's no more than a coincidence and is probably a Altocumulus cloud.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:19 pm YIKES!!! That really does look like Armisael! Scary!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Oct 13, 2009 10:46 pm -_- I just got out of the shower...Ill go kill it, brb.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Oct 14, 2009 2:56 am Dasvidaniya with love comrades.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Oct 14, 2009 2:57 am Pretty interesting. Although the first thing I thought when I saw that was "INDEPENDENCE DAY", but I can see why you'd connect it to Armasael.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Wed Oct 14, 2009 4:23 am EVA 01, LAUNCH!!! (That's awesome! *o*)

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Wed Oct 14, 2009 6:51 am Now you're truly fucked: [URL=http://img376.imageshack.us/i/godzillacloud.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Wed Oct 14, 2009 8:49 am Dr. Nick wrote: Now you're truly fucked: [URL=http://img376.imageshack.us/i/godzillacloud.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Wed Oct 14, 2009 10:34 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Dr. Nick wrote: Now you're truly fucked: [URL=http://img376.imageshack.us/i/godzillacloud.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Wed Oct 14, 2009 10:36 am there is only two people for this job SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Marzan » Wed Oct 14, 2009 11:11 am That would freak the s**t out of me!

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Oct 14, 2009 1:19 pm thats it, call ikari, its time to launch the evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Mon Oct 19, 2009 5:25 pm The video has died. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Oct 19, 2009 6:57 pm This video has been removed due to terms of use violation.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 19, 2009 8:44 pm Video was taken down by the time I saw this thread. Was it just some copyrighted thing or what?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Oct 19, 2009 8:49 pm There is usually a message like this if it had to do with copyright: This video has been taken down due to a copyright claim from [insert company name here]
